1	import SpriteKit
2	import UIKit
3	
4	final class GameScene: SKScene {
5	
6	    // MARK: - State
7	
8	    private enum GameState {
9	        case idle
10	        case animating
11	    }
12	
13	    private var state: GameState = .idle
14	
15	    // MARK: - Slides
16	
17	    private let slideShapes: [SlideShape] = [.straight, .curved, .wavy, .spiral]
18	    private var currentSlideIndex = 0
19	    private var currentSlideNode: SlideNode?
20	    private var slideLabel: SKLabelNode!
21	
22	    // MARK: - Characters
23	
24	    private var characterNodes: [CharacterNode] = []
25	    private let characterBarYFraction: CGFloat = 0.12
26	
27	    // MARK: - Touch tracking (swipe vs tap)
28	
29	    private var touchStart: CGPoint?
30	
31	    // MARK: - Layout
32	
33	    private func sceneLayout() -> SlideLayout {
34	        let sceneW = size.width
35	        let sceneH = size.height
36	        let barHeight = sceneH * 0.15
37	        let margin: CGFloat = 60
38	
39	        return SlideLayout(
40	            origin: CGPoint(x: margin, y: barHeight + 20),
41	            totalWidth: sceneW - margin * 2 - 100,
42	            totalHeight: sceneH - barHeight - 80
43	        )
44	    }
45	
46	    // MARK: - Scene init
47	
48	    static func makeScene(size: CGSize) -> GameScene {
49	        let scene = GameScene(size: size)
50	        scene.scaleMode = .resizeFill
51	        return scene
52	    }
53	
54	    override func didMove(to view: SKView) {
55	        backgroundColor = SKColor(red: 0.92, green: 0.96, blue: 0.88, alpha: 1) // 柔和奶油绿
56	
57	        SoundManager.shared.preloadAll()
58	
59	        setupSlideLabel()
60	        showSlide(at: currentSlideIndex, animated: false)
61	        setupCharacters()
62	    }
63	
64	    // MARK: - Slide label
65	
66	    private func setupSlideLabel() {
67	        slideLabel = SKLabelNode(fontNamed: "AvenirNext-Bold")
68	        slideLabel.fontSize = 32
69	        slideLabel.fontColor = SKColor.darkGray
70	        slideLabel.verticalAlignmentMode = .top
71	        slideLabel.horizontalAlignmentMode = .center
72	        slideLabel.position = CGPoint(x: size.width / 2, y: size.height - 20)
73	        slideLabel.zPosition = 100
74	        addChild(slideLabel)
75	    }
76	
77	    private func updateLabel() {
78	        let shape = slideShapes[currentSlideIndex]
79	        let emoji: String
80	        switch shape {
81	        case .straight: emoji = "🔴"
82	        case .curved:   emoji = "🔵"
83	        case .wavy:     emoji = "🟢"
84	        case .spiral:   emoji = "🟣"
85	        }
86	        slideLabel.text = "\(shape.name) \(emoji)"
87	    }
88	
89	    // MARK: - Slide management
90	
91	    private func showSlide(at index: Int, animated: Bool) {
92	        let layout = sceneLayout()
93	        let shape = slideShapes[index]
94	        let newSlide = SlideNode(shape: shape, layout: layout)
95	
96	        if animated, let old = currentSlideNode {
97	            let fadeOut = SKAction.sequence([
98	                old.fadeOut(duration: 0.25),
99	                SKAction.removeFromParent()
100	            ])
101	            old.run(fadeOut)
102	            newSlide.alpha = 0
103	            newSlide.run(SKAction.fadeIn(withDuration: 0.25))
104	        } else {
105	            currentSlideNode?.removeFromParent()
106	        }
107	
108	        addChild(newSlide)
109	        currentSlideNode = newSlide
110	        currentSlideIndex = index
111	        updateLabel()
112	    }
113	
114	    private func switchToSlide(_ index: Int) {
115	        guard index != currentSlideIndex, state == .idle else { return }
116	        state = .animating
117	        showSlide(at: index, animated: true)
118	
119	        // 短延迟后恢复可交互
120	        run(SKAction.sequence([
121	            SKAction.wait(forDuration: 0.35),
122	            SKAction.run { [weak self] in self?.state = .idle }
123	        ]))
124	    }
125	
126	    // MARK: - Characters setup
127	
128	    private func setupCharacters() {
129	        let sceneW = size.width
130	        let sceneH = size.height
131	        let barY = sceneH * characterBarYFraction
132	        let count = CharacterData.all.count
133	        let spacing = min(110, (sceneW - 120) / CGFloat(max(count, 1)))
134	        let totalWidth = spacing * CGFloat(count - 1)
135	        let startX = (sceneW - totalWidth) / 2
136	
137	        for (i, data) in CharacterData.all.enumerated() {
138	            let node = CharacterNode(data: data)
139	
140	            // 尝试加载真实纹理，失败则使用占位色块
141	            if let textureImage = UIImage(named: data.imageName) {
142	                node.updateTexture(SKTexture(image: textureImage))
143	            }
144	
145	            let pos = CGPoint(x: startX + CGFloat(i) * spacing, y: barY)
146	            node.position = pos
147	            node.homePosition = pos
148	            addChild(node)
149	            characterNodes.append(node)
150	        }
151	    }
152	
153	    // MARK: - Touch handling
154	
155	    override func touchesBegan(_ touches: Set<UITouch>, with event: UIEvent?) {
156	        guard let touch = touches.first else { return }
157	        touchStart = touch.location(in: self)
158	    }
159	
160	    override func touchesEnded(_ touches: Set<UITouch>, with event: UIEvent?) {
161	        guard let touch = touches.first, let start = touchStart else { return }
162	        let end = touch.location(in: self)
163	        let dx = end.x - start.x
164	        let dy = end.y - start.y
165	        let dist = hypot(dx, dy)
166	
167	        // 短距离 → 点击
168	        if dist < 30 {
169	            handleTap(at: end)
170	            return
171	        }
172	
173	        // 水平滑动 → 切换滑梯
174	        if abs(dx) > abs(dy) && abs(dx) > 40 {
175	            if dx > 0 {
176	                switchToSlide((currentSlideIndex - 1 + slideShapes.count) % slideShapes.count)
177	            } else {
178	                switchToSlide((currentSlideIndex + 1) % slideShapes.count)
179	            }
180	        }
181	    }
182	
183	    private func handleTap(at point: CGPoint) {
184	        guard state == .idle else { return }
185	
186	        for node in characterNodes {
187	            if node.hitTest(point) {
188	                startSlideSequence(for: node)
189	                return
190	            }
191	        }
192	    }
193	
194	    // MARK: - Slide sequence
195	
196	    private func startSlideSequence(for character: CharacterNode) {
197	        guard let slide = currentSlideNode else { return }
198	        state = .animating
199	
200	        // 音效：点击
201	        SoundManager.shared.play(.tap)
202	
203	        let layout = sceneLayout()
204	        let topPos = CGPoint(
205	            x: layout.slideStartX,
206	            y: layout.topY + 15
207	        )
208	        // 着陆区在滑道底部（路径终点 + 水平缓冲）
209	        let landingPos = CGPoint(x: layout.slideEndX + 40, y: layout.slideEndY)
210	        let returnPos = character.homePosition
211	
212	        // 滑行时长根据路径长度估算
213	        let path = slide.slidePath
214	        let duration: TimeInterval
215	        switch slideShapes[currentSlideIndex] {
216	        case .straight: duration = 1.0
217	        case .curved:   duration = 1.3
218	        case .wavy:     duration = 1.8
219	        case .spiral:   duration = 2.2
220	        }
221	
222	        let sequence = SKAction.sequence([
223	            // bounce + teleport
224	            character.bounceAction(),
225	            character.teleportAction(to: topPos),
226	            // start slide sound
227	            SKAction.run { SoundManager.shared.play(.slide) },
228	            // slide down
229	            character.slideAction(path: path, duration: duration),
230	            // stop slide sound, play boing
231	            SKAction.run {
232	                SoundManager.shared.stop(.slide)
233	                SoundManager.shared.play(.boing)
234	            },
235	            // land bounce
236	            character.landBounceAction(),
237	            // footsteps
238	            SKAction.run { SoundManager.shared.play(.footsteps) },
239	            // return
240	            character.returnAction(from: landingPos, to: returnPos),
241	            // done
242	            SKAction.run { [weak self] in
243	                self?.state = .idle
244	            }
245	        ])
246	
247	        character.run(sequence)
248	    }
249	}

1	import SpriteKit
2	
3	final class SlideNode: SKNode {
4	    let shape: SlideShape
5	    let layout: SlideLayout
6	
7	    /// 角色滑行跟随的路径
8	    var slidePath: CGPath { layout.slidePath(for: shape) }
9	
10	    private let outlineNode = SKShapeNode()
11	    private let railNode = SKShapeNode()
12	    private let highlightNode = SKShapeNode()
13	    private var structures: [SKShapeNode] = []
14	
15	    init(shape: SlideShape, layout: SlideLayout) {
16	        self.shape = shape
17	        self.layout = layout
18	        super.init()
19	        drawAll()
20	    }
21	
22	    required init?(coder aDecoder: NSCoder) {
23	        fatalError("init(coder:) has not been implemented")
24	    }
25	
26	    // MARK: - 绘制
27	
28	    private func drawAll() {
29	        drawRail()
30	        drawOutline()
31	        drawHighlight()
32	        drawStructures()
33	    }
34	
35	    private func drawRail() {
36	        let color = shape.color
37	        railNode.path = slidePath
38	        railNode.strokeColor = SKColor(red: color.r, green: color.g, blue: color.b, alpha: 1)
39	        railNode.lineWidth = 14
40	        railNode.lineCap = .round
41	        railNode.lineJoin = .round
42	        railNode.zPosition = 2
43	        addChild(railNode)
44	    }
45	
46	    private func drawOutline() {
47	        let color = shape.color
48	        outlineNode.path = slidePath
49	        outlineNode.strokeColor = SKColor(
50	            red: color.r * 0.4,
51	            green: color.g * 0.4,
52	            blue: color.b * 0.4,
53	            alpha: 0.8
54	        )
55	        outlineNode.lineWidth = 22
56	        outlineNode.lineCap = .round
57	        outlineNode.lineJoin = .round
58	        outlineNode.zPosition = 1
59	        addChild(outlineNode)
60	    }
61	
62	    private func drawHighlight() {
63	        highlightNode.path = slidePath
64	        highlightNode.strokeColor = SKColor(white: 1, alpha: 0.35)
65	        highlightNode.lineWidth = 4
66	        highlightNode.lineCap = .round
67	        highlightNode.lineJoin = .round
68	        highlightNode.zPosition = 3
69	        addChild(highlightNode)
70	    }
71	
72	    private func drawStructures() {
73	        let (r, g, b) = shape.color
74	        let dark = SKColor(red: r * 0.35, green: g * 0.35, blue: b * 0.35, alpha: 1)
75	
76	        // 梯子
77	        let ladder = SKShapeNode()
78	        let ladderPath = CGMutablePath()
79	        // 左柱
80	        ladderPath.addRect(CGRect(
81	            x: layout.ladderCenterX - layout.ladderWidth / 2,
82	            y: layout.groundY + 10,
83	            width: 6, height: layout.topY - layout.groundY - 10
84	        ))
85	        // 右柱
86	        ladderPath.addRect(CGRect(
87	            x: layout.ladderCenterX + layout.ladderWidth / 2 - 6,
88	            y: layout.groundY + 10,
89	            width: 6, height: layout.topY - layout.groundY - 10
90	        ))
91	        // 横档
92	        let rungCount = 6
93	        let rungSpacing = (layout.topY - layout.groundY - 10) / CGFloat(rungCount)
94	        for i in 0..<rungCount {
95	            let y = layout.groundY + 10 + CGFloat(i) * rungSpacing
96	            ladderPath.addRect(CGRect(
97	                x: layout.ladderCenterX - layout.ladderWidth / 2,
98	                y: y, width: layout.ladderWidth, height: 3
99	            ))
100	        }
101	        ladder.path = ladderPath
102	        ladder.fillColor = dark
103	        ladder.zPosition = 0
104	        addChild(ladder)
105	        structures.append(ladder)
106	
107	        // 顶部平台
108	        let platform = SKShapeNode()
109	        let platPath = CGMutablePath()
110	        platPath.addRect(CGRect(
111	            x: layout.origin.x,
112	            y: layout.topY - layout.platformThickness,
113	            width: layout.slideStartX - layout.origin.x + 10,
114	            height: layout.platformThickness
115	        ))
116	        platform.path = platPath
117	        platform.fillColor = dark
118	        platform.zPosition = 0
119	        addChild(platform)
120	        structures.append(platform)
121	
122	        // 支撑柱
123	        let pillar = SKShapeNode()
124	        let pillarPath = CGMutablePath()
125	        let midX = (layout.slideStartX + layout.slideEndX) / 2
126	        let midY = (layout.topY + layout.slideEndY) / 2
127	        pillarPath.addRect(CGRect(x: midX - 4, y: layout.groundY, width: 8, height: midY - layout.groundY))
128	        pillar.path = pillarPath
129	        pillar.fillColor = dark.withAlphaComponent(0.6)
130	        pillar.zPosition = 0
131	        addChild(pillar)
132	        structures.append(pillar)
133	
134	        // 着陆平台
135	        let landing = SKShapeNode()
136	        let landingPath = CGMutablePath()
137	        landingPath.addRect(CGRect(
138	            x: layout.slideEndX + 20,
139	            y: layout.groundY,
140	            width: 60, height: layout.bottomPlatformHeight
141	        ))
142	        landing.path = landingPath
143	        landing.fillColor = dark
144	        landing.zPosition = 0
145	        addChild(landing)
146	        structures.append(landing)
147	    }
148	
149	    // MARK: - 动画
150	
151	    func fadeOut(duration: TimeInterval = 0.3) -> SKAction {
152	        SKAction.fadeOut(withDuration: duration)
153	    }
154	
155	    func fadeIn(duration: TimeInterval = 0.3) -> SKAction {
156	        SKAction.fadeIn(withDuration: duration)
157	    }
158	}

1	import SpriteKit
2	
3	final class CharacterNode: SKNode {
4	    let data: CharacterData
5	    private let sprite: SKSpriteNode
6	    private let shadowNode: SKSpriteNode
7	
8	    /// 排队栏原位
9	    var homePosition: CGPoint = .zero
10	
11	    /// 用于检测点击的圆形区域
12	    var tapRadius: CGFloat = 45
13	
14	    init(data: CharacterData) {
15	        self.data = data
16	
17	        // 先用纯色方块占位，后续替换为真实纹理
18	        let size = CGSize(width: 60, height: 80)
19	        let renderer = UIGraphicsImageRenderer(size: size)
20	        let image = renderer.image { ctx in
21	            let rect = CGRect(origin: .zero, size: size)
22	            ctx.cgContext.setFillColor(UIColor(
23	                red: data.color.r, green: data.color.g, blue: data.color.b, alpha: 1
24	            ).cgColor)
25	            ctx.cgContext.fillEllipse(in: rect)
26	        }
27	
28	        sprite = SKSpriteNode(texture: SKTexture(image: image))
29	        sprite.setScale(data.scale)
30	        sprite.zPosition = 10
31	
32	        // 地面阴影
33	        shadowNode = SKSpriteNode(color: SKColor.black.withAlphaComponent(0.25), size: CGSize(width: 50, height: 14))
34	        shadowNode.zPosition = 5
35	
36	        super.init()
37	        addChild(shadowNode)
38	        addChild(sprite)
39	        shadowNode.position = CGPoint(x: 0, y: -size.height * data.scale / 2 + 7)
40	    }
41	
42	    required init?(coder aDecoder: NSCoder) {
43	        fatalError("init(coder:) has not been implemented")
44	    }
45	
46	    /// 更新纹理（下载完图片后调用），保持原始宽高比统一缩放至高度 80pt
47	    func updateTexture(_ texture: SKTexture) {
48	        sprite.texture = texture
49	        let texSize = texture.size()
50	        let scale = 80 / texSize.height
51	        sprite.size = CGSize(width: texSize.width * scale, height: 80)
52	    }
53	
54	    // MARK: - 动作序列
55	
56	    /// 排队栏弹跳（被点击选中时）
57	    func bounceAction() -> SKAction {
58	        let up = SKAction.moveBy(x: 0, y: 15, duration: 0.1)
59	        up.timingMode = .easeOut
60	        let down = SKAction.moveBy(x: 0, y: -15, duration: 0.15)
61	        down.timingMode = .easeIn
62	        return SKAction.sequence([up, down])
63	    }
64	
65	    /// 瞬移到滑梯顶部平台
66	    func teleportAction(to position: CGPoint) -> SKAction {
67	        let shrink = SKAction.scale(to: 0.1, duration: 0.15)
68	        shrink.timingMode = .easeIn
69	        let move = SKAction.move(to: position, duration: 0)
70	        let grow = SKAction.scale(to: data.scale, duration: 0.2)
71	        grow.timingMode = .easeOut
72	        return SKAction.sequence([shrink, move, grow])
73	    }
74	
75	    /// 沿滑道滑下
76	    func slideAction(path: CGPath, duration: TimeInterval) -> SKAction {
77	        let slide = SKAction.follow(path, asOffset: false, orientToPath: true, duration: duration)
78	        slide.timingMode = .easeInEaseOut
79	        return slide
80	    }
81	
82	    /// 着陆弹起
83	    func landBounceAction() -> SKAction {
84	        let squish = SKAction.scaleX(to: data.scale * 1.2, y: data.scale * 0.75, duration: 0.08)
85	        let stretch = SKAction.scaleX(to: data.scale * 0.85, y: data.scale * 1.15, duration: 0.08)
86	        let jump = SKAction.moveBy(x: 0, y: 20, duration: 0.12)
87	        let land = SKAction.moveBy(x: 0, y: -20, duration: 0.1)
88	        let reset = SKAction.scale(to: data.scale, duration: 0.06)
89	        return SKAction.sequence([squish, stretch, SKAction.group([jump, reset]), land])
90	    }
91	
92	    /// 走回排队栏（from: 当前所在位置，to: 目标位置——均须在构建时传入，因 SKAction 预构建不支持运行时动态计算）
93	    func returnAction(from: CGPoint, to: CGPoint) -> SKAction {
94	        let dx = to.x - from.x
95	        let dy = to.y - from.y
96	        let dist = hypot(dx, dy)
97	        let duration = max(0.5, dist / 200)
98	
99	        let move = SKAction.move(to: to, duration: duration)
100	        move.timingMode = .easeInEaseOut
101	
102	        // 小跳跃模拟走路；距离太短时跳过跳跃避免空序列 crash
103	        let hops = Int(dist / 40)
104	        guard hops > 0 else { return move }
105	
106	        var actions: [SKAction] = []
107	        for _ in 0..<hops {
108	            let hop = SKAction.moveBy(x: 0, y: 8, duration: 0.08)
109	            hop.timingMode = .easeOut
110	            let drop = SKAction.moveBy(x: 0, y: -8, duration: 0.08)
111	            drop.timingMode = .easeIn
112	            actions.append(hop)
113	            actions.append(drop)
114	        }
115	        let hopSequence = SKAction.sequence(actions)
116	        return SKAction.group([move, hopSequence])
117	    }
118	
119	    /// 检查某个点是否命中此角色
120	    func hitTest(_ point: CGPoint) -> Bool {
121	        let dx = point.x - position.x
122	        let dy = point.y - position.y
123	        return hypot(dx, dy) < tapRadius
124	    }
125	}

{"path": "docs/superpowers/specs/2025-06-29-slide-game-visual-upgrade.md", "content": "# Slide Game — 视觉动画全面升级规格

> 基于 SwiftU Animation + SpriteKit 最佳实践（communityauthor2/spritekit 814⭐ + communityauthor1/swiftui-pro 4227⭐）

---

## 1. 滑梯视觉：SKShapeNode → 预渲染纹理

**现状**：7 个 SKShapeNode（轮廓+滑道+高光+梯子+平台+柱子+着陆台），每个独立 draw call

**改法**（spritekit skill: "prefer SKSpriteNode with texture for repeated elements"）：

### 1.1 滑道主体
- `UIGraphicsImageRenderer` 预渲染完整滑道纹理，单次 draw call
- 渐变填充：顶部浅色 → 底部深色（立体圆柱感）
- 外层深色轮廓 6pt + 内层面色渐变 + 白色高光带 2pt（塑料反光）
- 圆角端点 `lineCap = .round`
- 护栏：滑道两侧细白线 + 小立柱

### 1.2 结构件
- 梯子：圆角矩形柱 + 渐变自上而下
- 平台：圆角 + 底部阴影偏移
- 支撑柱：渐变 + 阴影
- 全部合并为 1-2 张纹理 → SKSpriteNode

### 1.3 背景装饰
- 天空渐变：浅蓝 → 白（顶部 → 地平线）
- 3-4 朵白云 SKSpriteNode 缓慢水平漂移
- 底部绿色草地条带
- 右上角卡通太阳（黄色圆形 + 短射线）

---

## 2. 角色动画：弹簧物理化

**现状**：纯 scale/move 序列，线性 timingMode，僵硬

**改法**（swiftui-animation skill: spring physics + keyframe concept）：

### 2.1 点击弹跳（bounceAction）
```
现状: moveBy(0,15) easeOut → moveBy(0,-15) easeIn
改为: scaleTo(1.25, 0.12) easeOut → scaleTo(0.85, 0.15) easeIn → scaleTo(1.0, 0.2) spring-like
```
弹簧感：先放大 25% → 压缩 15% → 回弹到 100%（overshoot 小超调）

### 2.2 着陆弹起（landBounceAction）
```
现状: scaleX/Y 序列 hack
改为: squash & stretch
  落地瞬间: scaleX(1.25, y:0.75) 挤压
  → scaleX(0.85, y:1.2) 拉伸
  → group[ moveBy(0,25) easeOut + scaleTo(1.0, 0.15) ] 弹跳复原
  → moveBy(0,-25) easeIn 落地
```

### 2.3 滑行中逐帧 squash & stretch
`SKAction.customAction` 在 follow 路径同时：
- 沿滑道方向拉伸（倾斜向下时 scaleX 略增）
- 拐弯处轻微横向挤压
- 配合 `orientToPath: true` 的自动旋转

### 2.4 走回跳跃
```
现状: 固定 8pt 跳跃
改为: 振幅随距离衰减
  近: 3-4pt 小跳跃
  远: 8-12pt 大跳跃，逐渐减小
  timingMode: .easeInEaseOut
```

---

## 3. 粒子特效

**现状**：零

**改法**（spritekit skill: SKEmitterNode code-created, one-shot）：

### 3.1 滑行火花（slide spark）
- 触发：角色开始滑行
- 白色+主题色粒子，从角色底部/滑道接触面喷出
- `numParticlesToEmit = 30`，`particleLifetime = 0.5`
- 小尺寸（2-4pt），快速向下掉落

### 3.2 着陆星星爆发（landing burst）
- 触发：角色着陆弹跳瞬间
- 黄/金色星形粒子，向四周放射
- `numParticlesToEmit = 20`，`particleLifetime = 0.8`
- 带 fade out + 轻微旋转

### 3.3 瞬移 puff
- 触发：角色从排队栏消失上滑梯顶
- 白色烟雾 puff，角色消失时在原位短暂出现
- `numParticlesToEmit = 15`，`particleLifetime = 0.4`

### 3.4 滑梯切换粒子
- 触发：左右滑切换滑梯
- 滑梯颜色粒子从场景边缘飘入
- `numParticlesToEmit = 40`，与 fade 过渡同步

---

## 4. 滑梯切换动画

**现状**：旧滑梯 fadeOut + 新滑梯 fadeIn

**改法**：
- 保持 fade 过渡（0.3s），因为最简单的过渡对 2 岁儿童最清晰
- 加粒子效果（3.4）增强视觉反馈
- 滑梯名称标签用 `SKAction.scale` 做一个微小弹跳表示变化

---

## 5. 代码结构

新增文件：
- `SlideGame/Scene/EffectsNode.swift` — 粒子特效管理（spawnSpark / spawnBurst / spawnPuff）
- `SlideGame/Scene/BackgroundNode.swift` — 天空渐变 + 云 + 太阳 + 草地

修改文件：

- `SlideGame/Scene/CharacterNode.swift` — 弹簧化动画 + squash & stretch
- `SlideGame/Scene/GameScene.swift` — 粒子触发点 + 背景初始化 + 滑梯切换粒子

---

## 6. 验收

- [ ] 滑梯有明显渐变 + 高光，看起来像塑料玩具
- [ ] 角色弹跳有弹簧感（squash & stretch）
- [ ] 滑行有火花拖尾
- [ ] 着陆有星星爆发
- [ ] 瞬移有 puff 烟
- [ ] 天空有渐变 + 云 + 太阳 + 草地
- [ ] 滑梯切换有粒子过渡
- [ ] 全部 8 个角色 + 4 种滑梯正常工作
- [ ] BUILD SUCCEEDED

{"content": "import SpriteKit

/// 粒子特效管理器：滑行火花、着陆星星、瞬移 puff
final class EffectsNode {

    /// 滑行火花 —— 从角色下方沿滑道方向喷出
    static func sparkEmitter(color: SKColor) -> SKEmitterNode {
        let e = SKEmitterNode()
        e.particleTexture = sparkTexture()
        e.particleBirthRate = 120
        e.numParticlesToEmit = 30
        e.particleLifetime = 0.5
        e.particleLifetimeRange = 0.2
        e.particlePositionRange = CGVector(dx: 8, dy: 4)
        e.emissionAngle: CGFloat = -.pi / 2
        e.emissionAngleRange: CGFloat = .pi / 4
        e.particleSpeed = 60
        e.particleSpeedRange = 30
        e.particleAlpha = 0.9
        e.particleAlphaRange = 0.1
        e.particleAlphaSpeed = -1.5
        e.particleScale = 0.3
        e.particleScaleRange = 0.1
        e.particleScaleSpeed = -0.2
        e.particleColor = color
        e.particleColorBlendFactor = 0.8
        e.particleBlendMode = .add
        e.targetNode = nil // will be set by caller
        return e
    }

    /// 着陆星星爆发 —— 向四周放射
    static func starBurstEmitter() -> SKEmitterNode {
        let e = SKEmitterNode()
        e.particleTexture = starTexture()
        e.particleBirthRate = 200
        e.numParticlesToEmit = 20
        e.particleLifetime = 0.8
        e.particleLifetimeRange = 0.3
        e.particlePositionRange = CGVector(dx: 4, dy: 4)
        e.emissionAngle: CGFloat = 0
        e.emissionAngleRange: CGFloat = .pi * 2
        e.particleSpeed = 80
        e.particleSpeedRange = 40
        e.particleAlpha = 1.0
        e.particleAlphaSpeed = -1.2
        e.particleScale = 0.4
        e.particleScaleRange = 0.2
        e.particleScaleSpeed = -0.1
        e.particleRotation = 0
        e.particleRotationRange: CGFloat = .pi * 2
        e.particleRotationSpeed: CGFloat = .pi
        e.particleColor = SKColor(red: 1, green: 0.85, blue: 0.2, alpha: 1) // gold
        e.particleColorBlendFactor = 0.6
        e.particleColorSequence = nil
        e.particleBlendMode = .add
        return e
    }

    /// 瞬移 puff —— 白色烟雾
    static func puffEmitter() -> SKEmitterNode {
        let e = SKEmitterNode()
        e.particleTexture = puffTexture()
        e.particleBirthRate = 100
        e.numParticlesToEmit = 15
        e.particleLifetime = 0.4
        e.particleLifetimeRange = 0.15
        e.particlePositionRange = CGVector(dx: 10, dy: 5)
        e.emissionAngle: CGFloat = -.pi / 2
        e.emissionAngleRange: CGFloat = .pi / 4
        e.particleSpeed = 40
        e.particleSpeedRange = 20
        e.particleAlpha = 0.6
        e.particleAlphaSpeed = -1.5
        e.particleScale = 0.5
        e.particleScaleRange = 0.2
        e.particleScaleSpeed = 0.3
        e.particleColor = .white
        e.particleColorBlendFactor = 0.5
        e.particleBlendMode = .alpha
        return e
    }

    /// 滑梯切换彩色粒子
    static func transitionEmitter(color: SKColor) -> SKEmitterNode {
        let e = SKEmitterNode()
        e.particleTexture = sparkTexture()
        e.particleBirthRate = 150
        e.numParticlesToEmit = 40
        e.particleLifetime = 0.6
        e.particleLifetimeRange = 0.2
        e.particlePositionRange = CGVector(dx: 20, dy: 10)
        e.emissionAngle: CGFloat = 0
        e.emissionAngleRange: CGFloat = .pi * 2
        e.particleSpeed = 50
        e.particleSpeedRange = 30
        e.particleAlpha = 0.7
        e.particleAlphaSpeed = -1.0
        e.particleScale = 0.25
        e.particleScaleSpeed = -0.1
        e.particleColor = color
        e.particleColorBlendFactor = 1.0
        e.particleBlendMode = .add
        return e
    }

    /// 在场景中触发一次性爆发，自动清理
    @discardableResult
    static func burst(_ emitter: SKEmitterNode, at position: CGPoint, on scene: SKScene) -> SKEmitterNode {
        emitter.position = position
        emitter.targetNode = scene
        scene.addChild(emitter)

        let lifetime = emitter.particleLifetime + emitter.particleLifetimeRange
        let wait = SKAction.wait(forDuration: TimeInterval(lifetime + 0.2))
        emitter.run(SKAction.sequence([wait, .removeFromParent()]))
        return emitter
    }

    // MARK: - Particle Textures (tiny procedural)

    private static func sparkTexture() -> SKTexture {
        let size = CGSize(width: 8, height: 8)
        let img = UIGraphicsImageRenderer(size: size).image { ctx in
            let c = ctx.cgContext
            let colors = [
                UIColor.white.cgColor,
                UIColor.white.withAlphaComponent(0).cgColor,
            ] as CFArray
            guard let g = CGGradient(colorsSpace: CGColorSpace(name: CGColorSpace.sRGB)!,
                                     colors: colors, locations: [0, 1]) else { return }
            c.drawRadialGradient(g,
                                 startCenter: CGPoint(x: 4, y: 4), startRadius: 0,
                                 endCenter: CGPoint(x: 4, y: 4), endRadius: 4,
                                 options: [])
        }
        return SKTexture(image: img)
    }

    private static func starTexture() -> SKTexture {
        let size = CGSize(width: 12, height: 12)
        let img = UIGraphicsImageRenderer(size: size).image { ctx in
            let c = ctx.cgContext
            // 4-point star shape
            let cx: CGFloat = 6, cy: CGFloat = 6
            let outer: CGFloat = 6, inner: CGFloat = 2.5
            c.move(to: CGPoint(x: cx, y: cy - outer))
            c.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: cx + inner, y: cy - inner))
            c.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: cx + outer, y: cy))
            c.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: cx + inner, y: cy + inner))
            c.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: cx, y: cy + outer))
            c.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: cx - inner, y: cy + inner))
            c.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: cx - outer, y: cy))
            c.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: cx - inner, y: cy - inner))
            c.closePath()
            c.setFillColor(UIColor.white.cgColor)
            c.fillPath()
        }
        return SKTexture(image: img)
    }

    private static func puffTexture() -> SKTexture {
        let size = CGSize(width: 16, height: 16)
        let img = UIGraphicsImageRenderer(size: size).image { ctx in
            let c = ctx.cgContext
            let colors = [
                UIColor.white.withAlphaComponent(0.9).cgColor,
                UIColor.white.withAlphaComponent(0).cgColor,
            ] as CFArray
            guard let g = CGGradient(colorsSpace: CGColorSpace(name: CGColorSpace.sRGB)!,
                                     colors: colors, locations: [0, 1]) else { return }
            c.drawRadialGradient(g,
                                 startCenter: CGPoint(x: 8, y: 8), startRadius: 0,
                                 endCenter: CGPoint(x: 8, y: 8), endRadius: 8,
                                 options: [])
        }
        return SKTexture(image: img)
    }
}

30	// MARK: - 滑梯布局数据

32	struct SlideLayout {
33	    /// 滑梯在场景中的原点（梯子底部中心）
34	    let origin: CGPoint
35	    /// 整体宽度
36	    let totalWidth: CGFloat
37	    /// 整体高度（地面到顶部平台）
38	    let totalHeight: CGFloat
39	
40	    // 子部件尺寸
41	    let ladderWidth: CGFloat = 70
42	    let platformLength: CGFloat = 50
43	    let platformThickness: CGFloat = 16
44	    let bottomPlatformHeight: CGFloat = 40
45	    let railThickness: CGFloat = 8
46	
47	    /// 地面 Y 坐标
48	    var groundY: CGFloat { origin.y }
49	    /// 顶部平台 Y 坐标
50	    var topY: CGFloat { origin.y + totalHeight }
51	    /// 梯子中心 X
52	    var ladderCenterX: CGFloat { origin.x + ladderWidth / 2 }
53	    /// 滑道起点 X（顶部平台右端）
54	    var slideStartX: CGFloat { origin.x + ladderWidth + platformLength }
55	    /// 滑道终点 X
56	    var slideEndX: CGFloat { origin.x + totalWidth }
57	    /// 滑道终点 Y（底部平台上方）
58	    var slideEndY: CGFloat { origin.y + bottomPlatformHeight }
59	
60	    /// 梯子路径（角色攀爬，从下到上）
61	    var ladderPath: CGPath {
62	        let path = CGMutablePath()
63	        path.move(to: CGPoint(x: ladderCenterX, y: groundY + 10))
64	        path.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: ladderCenterX, y: topY - platformThickness))
65	        return path
66	    }
67	
68	    /// 顶部平台短路径（梯子顶 → 滑道起点）
69	    func topPlatformPath() -> CGPath {
70	        let path = CGMutablePath()
71	        path.move(to: CGPoint(x: ladderCenterX, y: topY))
72	        path.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: slideStartX, y: topY))

74	    }

79	extension SlideLayout {
80	    /// 直滑梯的滑行路径（从顶部平台到着陆区）
81	    func straightSlidePath() -> CGPath {
82	        let path = CGMutablePath()
83	        path.move(to: CGPoint(x: slideStartX, y: topY))
84	        path.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: slideEndX, y: slideEndY))

90	    /// 弯滑梯（J形）的滑行路径 —— 顶部陡、底部平缓
91	    func curvedSlidePath() -> CGPath {
92	        let path = CGMutablePath()
93	        path.move(to: CGPoint(x: slideStartX, y: topY))
94	
95	        let midX = slideStartX + (slideEndX - slideStartX) * 0.45
96	        let midY = topY - totalHeight * 0.5
97	
98	        path.addQuadCurve(
99	            to: CGPoint(x: slideEndX, y: slideEndY),
100	            control: CGPoint(x: midX - 20, y: midY - 30)
101	        )
102	        // 底部水平缓冲
103	        path.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: slideEndX + 40, y: slideEndY))
104	        return path
105	    }
106	
107	    /// 波浪滑梯的滑行路径 —— 2 个波峰
108	    func wavySlidePath() -> CGPath {
109	        let path = CGMutablePath()
110	        path.move(to: CGPoint(x: slideStartX, y: topY))
111	
112	        let dx = slideEndX - slideStartX
113	        let dy = topY - slideEndY
114	
115	        // 3 段贝塞尔模拟波浪
116	        let cp1 = CGPoint(x: slideStartX + dx * 0.18, y: topY - dy * 0.15)
117	        let cp2 = CGPoint(x: slideStartX + dx * 0.35, y: topY - dy * 0.45)
118	        let end1 = CGPoint(x: slideStartX + dx * 0.33, y: topY - dy * 0.33)
119	
120	        let cp3 = CGPoint(x: slideStartX + dx * 0.50, y: topY - dy * 0.50)
121	        let cp4 = CGPoint(x: slideStartX + dx * 0.68, y: topY - dy * 0.75)
122	        let end2 = CGPoint(x: slideStartX + dx * 0.66, y: topY - dy * 0.66)
123	
124	        let cp5 = CGPoint(x: slideStartX + dx * 0.82, y: topY - dy * 0.85)
125	        let cp6 = CGPoint(x: slideStartX + dx * 1.0, y: topY - dy * 0.95)
126	
127	        path.addCurve(to: end1, control1: cp1, control2: cp2)
128	        path.addCurve(to: end2, control1: cp3, control2: cp4)
129	        path.addCurve(to: CGPoint(x: slideEndX, y: slideEndY), control1: cp5, control2: cp6)
130	        // 底部水平缓冲
131	        path.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: slideEndX + 40, y: slideEndY))
132	        return path
133	    }
134	
135	    /// 螺旋滑梯 —— 3 圈螺旋下降，侧视表现为交替 S 曲线
136	    func spiralSlidePath() -> CGPath {
137	        let path = CGMutablePath()
138	        let loops = 3
139	        let totalDrop = topY - slideEndY
140	        let segmentDrop = totalDrop / CGFloat(loops * 2 + 1)
141	        let oscWidth: CGFloat = (slideEndX - slideStartX) * 0.35
142	        let centerX = (slideStartX + slideEndX) / 2
143	
144	        var y = topY
145	        path.move(to: CGPoint(x: slideStartX, y: y))
146	
147	        for i in 0..<(loops * 2) {
148	            y -= segmentDrop
149	            let toRight = (i % 2 == 0)
150	            let targetX = toRight ? centerX + oscWidth : centerX - oscWidth
151	
152	            let cp1 = CGPoint(x: toRight ? centerX : centerX, y: y + segmentDrop * 0.6)
153	            let cp2 = CGPoint(x: targetX, y: y + segmentDrop * 0.4)
154	
155	            path.addCurve(to: CGPoint(x: targetX, y: y), control1: cp1, control2: cp2)
156	        }
157	
158	        // 最后一段到着陆区
159	        let finalTargetX = slideEndX
160	        let finalCp = CGPoint(x: slideStartX + oscWidth, y: y + segmentDrop * 0.5)
161	        path.addQuadCurve(to: CGPoint(x: finalTargetX, y: slideEndY), control: finalCp)
162	
163	        // 底部水平缓冲
164	        path.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: slideEndX + 40, y: slideEndY))
165	
166	        return path
167	    }

173	        case .wavy:     return wavySlidePath()
174	        case .spiral:   return spiralSlidePath()

搜的结果没有魔法方案。直接说清问题根因 + 提出恢复计划。

**我诊断的三个 bug：**

1. **滑梯上下颠倒** — `UIGraphicsImageRenderer` 坐标系 Y 轴朝下，SpriteKit Y 轴朝上。我画纹理时没翻转 Y，导致滑梯图像在场景里倒了过来
2. **角色一团黑** — 滑梯 bodySprite 是一张覆盖整个画布的大纹理。即使大部分区域"透明"，`UIGraphicsImageRenderer` 在某些情况下会产出不透明背景，把底下所有东西盖住了
3. **人物隔空飞** — 纹理和路径的坐标系不一致，视觉上的滑梯位置和 `SKAction.follow` 沿的路径对不上

**根本问题不是这三个 bug，是方法错了**：把 7 个简单清晰的 `SKShapeNode` 合并成一张无法调试的大纹理，为一个 2 岁儿童游戏做"性能优化"，完全搞错了方向。

---

**我的建议：**

1. `git revert` 回到视觉升级前的 commit（保留角色图清理）
2. 只改最小的一处——比如滑道加个渐变描边（两层 SKShapeNode，不同深浅同一路径）
3. Build → 模拟器跑 → 你看一眼 → 通过再做下一处
